case_title: BRITISH INSURANCE COMPANY OF CAYMAN VS. ASEGURADORA INTERACCIONES,S.A.

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRITISH INSURANCE COMPANY OF CAYMAN AS TO DEFENDANT ASEGURADORA INTERACCIONES,S.A. F/K/A  SEGUROS LA REPUBLICA, S.A. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRITISH INSURANCE COMPANY OF CAYMAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ASEGURADORA INTERACCIONES,S.A. F/K/A  SEGUROS LA REPUBLICA, S.A. $11,061,759.00 PRINCIPAL, $3,717,664.00 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,779,648.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRITISH INSURANCE COMPANY OF CAYMAN AS TO DEFENDANT ASEGURADORA INTERACCIONES,S.A. F/K/A  SEGUROS LA REPUBLICA, S.A.
